GET /static/<path:filename> -> static
GET / -> main.index
POST /api/genealogy/verify-passphrase -> main.verify_genealogy_passphrase
GET /genealogy -> main.genealogy_page
GET /contact -> main.contact_page
GET /documents -> main.documents_page
GET /chinh-sach-bao-mat -> main.privacy_page
GET /privacy-policy -> main.privacy_page
GET /privacy -> main.privacy_page
GET /login -> auth.login_page
GET /admin/login-page -> auth.admin_login_page
POST /api/login -> auth.api_login
POST /api/logout -> auth.api_logout
GET /api/current-user -> auth.get_current_user
GET /activities -> activities.activities_page
GET /activities/<int:activity_id> -> activities.activity_detail_page
GET /editor -> activities.editor_page
GET /api/activities/can-post -> activities.api_activities_can_post
POST /api/activities/post-login -> activities.api_activities_post_login
GET|POST /api/activities -> activities.api_activities
DELETE|GET|PUT /api/activities/<int:activity_id> -> activities.api_activity_detail
GET /api/family-tree -> family_tree.get_family_tree
GET /api/relationships -> family_tree.get_relationships
GET /api/children/<parent_id> -> family_tree.get_children
POST /api/genealogy/sync -> family_tree.sync_genealogy_from_members

GET /api/ancestors/<person_id> -> family_tree.get_ancestors
GET /api/descendants/<person_id> -> family_tree.get_descendants
GET /api/generations -> family_tree.get_generations_api
GET /api/persons -> persons.get_persons
GET /api/person/<person_id> -> persons.get_person
GET /api/search -> persons.search_persons
POST /api/edit-requests -> persons.create_edit_request
DELETE /api/person/<person_id> -> persons.delete_person
PUT /api/person/<person_id> -> persons.update_person
POST /api/person/<person_id>/sync -> persons.sync_person
POST /api/persons -> persons.create_person
PUT /api/persons/<person_id> -> persons.update_person_members
GET|POST /api/fix/p-1-1-parents -> persons.fix_p1_1_parents
POST /api/genealogy/update-info -> persons.update_genealogy_info
DELETE /api/persons/batch -> persons.delete_persons_batch
GET /members -> members_portal.members
POST /members/verify -> members_portal.members_verify
GET|POST /members/logout -> members_portal.members_logout

GET /members/export/excel -> members_portal.export_members_excel

GET /members/template/Template_updatetbqc.xlsx -> members_portal.download_template_update_sll
POST /api/members/bulk-update-sll -> members_portal.bulk_update_members_sll
GET /members/my-data -> members_portal.members_my_data
POST /members/request-deletion -> members_portal.members_request_deletion
GET /api/geoapify-key -> gallery.get_geoapify_api_key
POST /api/grave/update-location -> gallery.update_grave_location
POST /api/grave/upload-image -> gallery.upload_grave_image
POST /api/grave/delete-image -> gallery.delete_grave_image
GET|POST /api/grave-search -> gallery.search_grave
POST /api/upload-image -> gallery.upload_image
GET /family-tree-core.js -> gallery.serve_core_js
GET /family-tree-ui.js -> gallery.serve_ui_js
GET /genealogy-lineage.js -> gallery.serve_genealogy_js
GET /static/images/<path:filename> -> gallery.serve_image_static
GET /api/gallery/anh1 -> gallery.api_gallery_anh1
POST /api/albums/verify-password -> gallery.api_verify_album_password
GET /api/albums -> gallery.api_get_albums
POST /api/albums -> gallery.api_create_album
PUT /api/albums/<int:album_id> -> gallery.api_update_album

GET /api/albums/<int:album_id>/images -> gallery.api_get_album_images
DELETE /api/albums/<int:album_id>/images -> gallery.api_delete_album_images
GET /images/<path:filename> -> gallery.serve_image
POST /api/admin/sync-tbqc-accounts -> admin.api_sync_tbqc_accounts
GET|POST /admin/login -> admin_login
GET /admin/logout -> admin_logout
GET /admin/dashboard -> admin_dashboard
GET /admin/activities -> admin_activities_page
GET /api/activities/can-post -> api_activities_can_post
GET /admin/requests -> admin_requests
POST /admin/api/requests/<int:request_id>/process -> api_process_request
GET /admin/users -> admin_users
POST /admin/api/users -> api_create_user

GET /admin/api/table-stats -> admin_api_table_stats

PUT /admin/api/csv-data/<sheet_name>/<int:row_index> -> update_csv_row
DELETE /admin/api/csv-data/<sheet_name>/<int:row_index> -> delete_csv_row

POST /admin/api/members -> create_member_admin
PUT /admin/api/members/<person_id> -> update_member_admin
DELETE /admin/api/members/<person_id> -> delete_member
